title: PersistedWorktreeSession
description: Worktree session metadata recorded in worktree-state JSONL entries. When the worktree was torn down, the entry carries null instead of an object.

originalCwd.description: cwd recorded when the session was launched (the parent repo, not the worktree).

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the worktree directory.

worktreeName.description: Short name of the worktree (used in path/branch).

worktreeBranch.description: Branch checked out inside the worktree.

originalBranch.description: Branch in the parent repo before the worktree was created.

originalHeadCommit.description: Head commit of the parent repo at worktree creation time.

sessionId.description: UUID of the session that created the worktree.

tmuxSessionName.description: tmux session name when hook-based isolation is in use.

hookBased.description: True when the worktree is managed by Claude Code hooks rather than the desktop app.
